extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MEDB21RoutineLabPanel
title: MEDB 2.1 Routine Laboratory Panel
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for routine laboratory panel. Captures comprehensive blood chemistry, hematology, and urinalysis data for spaceflight crew members.
purpose: To assess pre- and postflight clinical laboratory values for comprehensive health assessment of spaceflight crew members
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: To obtain comprehensive clinical laboratory data for health assessment, establish baselines, and monitor for spaceflight-related physiological changes.
Complete blood count, comprehensive metabolic panel, lipid panel, urinalysis
Fasting blood draw and urine collection for comprehensive laboratory analysis.
AME L-9/6 m, L-60 to L-10 days

code.display: Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
